title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Gaultheria procumbens, also known as wintergreen, essential oils helps with cough because it contains methyl salicylate, a natural salicylate that mimics the pain-relieving and anti-inflammatory properties of aspirin. This makes it effective in reducing inflammation in the throat and airways, helping to alleviate coughing caused by respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.
